title: ConicEmojis
description: Super light weight, Chat Emoji plugin 50+ default emojis.
body:
# **Conic Emojis ✨**  
**The super light weight emoji plugin.**  
<u>The plugin includes over 50+ default emojis in the config.</u>

__Incase if you find any bugs, report <u>[**them here**](https://discord.gg/JvVv7wHQc7)</u>__

<u>[**Use LPC or Chatformatter to use RGB Texts**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lpc-chat)</u>

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
![ConicEmojis In-Game](https://i.postimg.cc/MKSqZ43s/2025-08-15-15-52-05.png)

## 📝 Overview  
**ConicEmojis** is an ultra-lightweight Emojis plugin for **Paper/Bukkit 1.21.x** that combines with really good features. **Custom Emojis, Additional configuration.**

Read [**Documents Here**](https://github.com/SwarajDev5/ConicEmojis/)

---

## 🆕 What's New with ConicEmojis 
✔ **Custom Emojis** Use custom emojis from text.  
✔ **Highly Configurable** Can add infinite emojis through configuration.  
✔ **Stable with Paper/Bukkit/Spigot**
✔ **Additional emojis** You can add as many emojis you want through config.yml

<u>**config.yml**</u>
```
emojis:
  hello: '&c👋' 
  hi: '🖐️'
  textname: '&cYour text here compressed in ":textname:"'
```

---

## ✨ Features  
✅ Use custom emojis from text.  
✅ Can add infinite emojis through configuration.  
✅ Stable with Paper/Bukkit/Spigot
✅ Works perfectly on Chatting Servers.  
✅ Built for Paper 1.21.x  
✅ PlaceholderAPI integration  

---

## ⌨ Commands  
```
/conicemoji - Help commands.
/conicemoji reload - Reload the configuration.
/conicemoji list - Lists the whole emojis that exists in <u>config.yml</u>

Aliases
/emoji, /emojis
```
---

Permissions
```
conicemoji.reload
conicemoji.use
conicemoji.list
```
📥 Installation
Download the latest ConicEmojis.jar
Place it in your /plugins folder
Start your server
Enjoy the plugin features!

💬 Support & Issues
Github: [Click Here](https://github.com/SwarajDev5/ConicEmojis/issues/)
